title: OS Compatibility Testing - macOS 26 (Tahoe)
body: Testing Details Testing is being conducted using macOS 26.0 on a 2020 13-inch M1 MacBook Pro, a 2023 M2 Mac Mini, and a Mac VM. Recommendation macOS 26 is currently supported on Departmental Support-managed systems per DoIT Support's supported OS policy . See Apple Silicon-specific compatibility here . Note: Upgrading to macOS 26 (Tahoe) may reset security allowances for some applications. This will cause dialogue boxes to pop up asking you to "Allow" certain apps again even if you've already done so in the past. This is a one-time process. macOS 26 (Tahoe) Test Results Software Version Tested Vendor Support Information DoIT Upgrade Test Result DoIT New Install Test Result DoIT Testing Notes Active Directory N/A Pass Pass Domain join to CADS and login using NetID were both successful on new macOS 26.0 instances. Maintains domain connection when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Adobe Creative Cloud 6.7.0.278 No Official Support Stated Adobe Creative Cloud System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS 26.0 instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Adobe Creative Cloud desktop application starts at login. Successfully installs new Adobe CC applications. Bomgar Jump Client 25.1.1.0 No Official Support Stated Supported Platforms Pass Pass Client works properly when run on macOS 26.0 Can jump to macOS 26.0 systems from Windows and Mac systems Bomgar Representative Console 25.1.1.0 No Official Support Stated Supported Platforms Pass Pass Console works properly when run on macOS 26.0 Can connect to macOS 26.0 systems Box Drive 2.47.161 Explicit Support Stated System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from the previous macOS version to 26.0. Box-folder syncs successfully. Shared Box folders syncs successfully. Successfully add, edit, and remove files from the Box folder. BigFix (Security) 3.3.2 No Official Support Stated Compatibility Matrix Pass / Fail (See NOTE ) Pass / Fail (See NOTE ) NOTE: If you launch the Self Service App from the Dock or Search you may be unable to restart your Mac until you close the BigFix Self Service App with Activity Monitor. You may still safely launch the Self Service App from the Menu Bar at the top of the screen by clicking the white "W" or blue "b" icon. This is a returning bug from the last macOS upgrade and will likely be fixed with the next BigFix Client Update. Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Launches Self Service Application successfully. Reports into BigFix console, receives deployments, and reports back to relevance inquiries successfully. The Offers dashboard appears correctly and allows for the acceptance and deployment of offer content. Cisco Secure Endpoint (Security) 1.27.0 Explicit Support Stated for 1.27.0 and Later macOS System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Reports data to the management console. Scans complete successfully. EICAR test file is detected immediately and deleted upon download. DisplayLink Manager 14.0 Explicit Support Stated for 13.1 and Later System Requirements and Download Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26 Google Drive 114.0.1.0 Implicit Support Stated System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Successfully add, edit, and remove files from the Google Drive folder. Offline files work as expected. Microsoft Teams 25255.702.3963.1832 Implicit Support Stated System Requirements for Teams on a Mac Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Successfully sends and receives messages to and from individuals, groups, and teams. Successfully performs calls and video conferencing via the built-in solutions. Successfully creates new teams and modifies existing teams. Searching for contacts working as expected. Microsoft 365 16.101.1 Implicit Support Stated System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Excel, PowerPoint, and Word Adds M365 account to Excel, PowerPoint, and Word successfully. Successfully creates, edits, and opens documents in Excel, PowerPoint, and Word. Outlook M365 account syncs to Outlook successfully. Sends and receives emails as expected. Reflects email folder and read status on account as expected. Calendar events, details, and invitees appear successfully. Able to create new calendar events, invite attendees, check invitees' availability, add notes. Palo Alto GlobalProtect 6.2.7-1047 Explicit Support Stated for 6.2.8-c317 and Later Compatibility Matrix Pass Pass System may ask to allow Global Protect to filter network traffic Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Connects successfully with dynamic pool. Connects successfully with static IP. Qualys Cloud Agent (Security) 6.0.1-20 Explicit Support Stated for 6.1.0 and Later Platform Availability Matrix Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Reports data to the management console. Spirion (Security) N/A N/A Testing for Spirion Mac Version is ongoing VMware Workspace ONE Intelligent Hub 24.11.3 Implicit Support Stated Release Notes Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Reports data to the management console. Executes commands issued from the console. Webex 45.9.0.33085 Explicit Support Stated for 45.9.0.33085 and Later What's New In Webex Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Successfully joins video conferencing meetings. Outlook calendar items visible within Webex. Searching for contacts working as expected. Successfully make and receive calls. Successfully review voicemail messages. Zoom 6.6.0 (64511) Implicit Support Stated Zoom System Requirements Pass Pass Installs successfully on new macOS instances and works as expected when upgrading from macOS 15 to 26.0. Able to create meetings, join existing meetings, video and audio working. Virtual backgrounds working.
